about.story: Since 2012, we have served as a trusted bridge in the global supply chain. We deliver quality products from China and beyond to leading Turkish importers at competitive costs. With over a decade of experience, we have successfully completed thousands of deliveries.
about.mission: To facilitate Turkish businesses access to global markets and make every delivery safe, transparent, and profitable.
about.vision: To become Turkey's most trusted global sourcing platform, setting the industry benchmark through our technology and human-centered approach.

values.title: Transparency
values.desc: We share every step with you.

values.title: Speed
values.desc: We know the value of time.

values.title: Expertise
values.desc: We know the industry inside out.

why_us: Network of 50+ verified suppliers in China
10+ years of customs and logistics expertise
Competitive pricing and transparent cost structure

services.hero_subtitle: Complete solutions from sourcing to your doorstep

items.title: Sea Freight
items.desc: FCL/LCL container shipments from Chinese ports to Turkey. Most economical solution for large volumes.

items.title: Air Cargo
items.desc: Fast air cargo solutions for urgent and high-value shipments. 5-7 business days from China to Turkey.

items.title: Road Logistics
items.desc: Domestic distribution and road transport on Central Asian routes.

items.title: Customs Consulting
items.desc: Expert customs consulting for all import processes. Documents, tariffs and regulations.

items.title: Supply Management
items.desc: Factory inspection, quality control, and supplier management services in China.

items.title: Cargo Insurance
items.desc: Comprehensive cargo insurance to international standards. Every load, every route.

contact.hero_subtitle: We will get back to you as soon as possible
